No major movement though. * Xiaolin: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-537 Lustre Wiki: Review Robinhood Policy Engi..."
ns1:revision.ns1:text:
== Attendance ==
* Microsoft: Ellis Wilson, Xiaolin Zang, Cyrus Ramavarapu * Iowa State University: Shane Nehring * Oak Ridge National Lab: Rick Mohr * Humboldt-Universität zu Berlin: Detlev Conrad Mielczarek
== Minutes ==
* Ellis: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-542 Lustre Wiki: Review Lustre Tuning Pages] - Outline still in-progress. No major movement though. * Xiaolin: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-537 Lustre Wiki: Review Robinhood Policy Engine Page] - No progress. * Cyrus: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-536 Lustre Wiki: Review Old/Obscure Tool or System Integration Pages] - No progress. * Detlev: Created [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-553 Updating Lustre Building Instsructions] - Needs reviews for his drafts attached to JIRA issue. * Rick: Still needs to pick a new project. Ellis gave him links to the excel doc as well as comments on what has been done so far on the wiki. * Shane: [https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LUDOC-540 Lustre Wiki: Review ZFS Feature Pages] - No progress.
[[Category:DWG]]
